mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 200 in the CPIAUCSL series signals central bank inaction, leading to real rate compression and positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days as investors price in future rate hikes.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 198.5 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL indicate accommodative policy and disinflation, creating a favorable environment for equity valuations and positive 60-day S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Interaction term between FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL shows no significant correlation with SPX returns over 60-day horizons.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in UNRATE below 5% signals tightening labor markets, increasing corporate pricing power and generating positive 20-day S&P 500 returns through earnings momentum.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 20-day returns in 50%+ of periods where UNRATE remains below 5.0.

mechanism_narrative: Rising HOUST data above 2100 units indicates strong housing demand, driving construction activity and consumer confidence, which predicts positive 5-day S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where HOUST exceeds 2100.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating INDPRO growth above 107.055 signals industrial recovery, boosting corporate earnings and generating positive 60-day S&P 500 returns through improved profit visibility.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 60-day returns in 50%+ of periods where INDPRO exceeds 107.055.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDPC1 and RSAFS indicates robust aggregate demand, creating positive momentum in equity markets and predicting 20-day S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Interaction term between GDPC1 and RSAFS shows no significant correlation with SPX returns over 20-day horizons.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month surge in PAYEMS above 134,061 thousand signals strong employment growth, boosting consumer spending and generating positive 5-day S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 134061.
